steps: Contact MUFG Custody to request refund of JPY 119,850 excess withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit JP-NO tax treaty documentation showing 10% rate applies vs 15% withheld
Reference Japanese National Tax Agency treaty provisions to support the lower withholding rate claim
If MUFG denies claim, file reclaim directly with Japanese tax authorities using treaty benefits

references.title: Japanese National Tax Agency – Tax Treaties
